pi_items.metadata_value: Create overlay chart with two instruments and indicators
pi_items.verified_value: Overlay multiple instruments on single chart panel with technical indicators
pi_items.source: task.json description specifies: Open new Chart with SPY as primary, add AAPL as secondary data series to same panel, add SMA indicators to both series

pi_items.verified_value: Function checks: workspace modification, same-chart overlay detection, SMA indicator presence, timeframe verification, and VLM visual confirmation
pi_items.source: verifier.py::verify_overlay_multi_instrument_chart contains programmatic checks for overlay, SMA count (expects 2), timeframe, and visual VLM verification

privileged_info_summary: The task requires overlaying two real stock instruments (SPY and AAPL) on a single NinjaTrader chart with daily timeframe, adding SMA indicators with period 50 to each series. The data comes from Yahoo Finance spanning 502 trading days (January 3, 2023 - December 31, 2024) in standard OHLCV format. SPY is the primary instrument and AAPL is the secondary. The task difficulty is marked as 'hard' with a timeout of 480 seconds and maximum 60 steps. Success requires programmatic verification of the overlay configuration and presence of both SMA(50) indicators.
